title: Indiranagar Chain Snatching Spree
description: A motorcycle-borne duo committed 7 chain snatching incidents across Indiranagar and Domlur over 8 days. All victims were women walking alone in the evening. Suspects used a red motorcycle, pillion rider executed the snatch. One victim was injured when dragged.
modus_operandi: Motorcycle-borne two-person team, pillion snatcher, targeting solo women in evening, rapid exit via side streets.

suspects.description: Male, pillion, no helmet, wore red jacket, executed snatches

evidence.description: Red motorcycle captured on 3 different street cameras across incidents
Multiple victims described red jacket on pillion rider consistently
Motorcycle plate partially captured — KA-05 series

blind_spots: Motorcycle plate not run against KA-05 series until day 5
Pattern across 7 incidents not mapped geographically until day 6
No alert issued to local jewellers to watch for resale attempts
resolution: Geographic pattern analysis pinpointed likely base area. Motorcycle spotted and intercepted. Both arrested day 12.
